edgeCases: Clean merge clears a stale pending marker from a prior stalled attempt (patch 1 regression)
WritePending is atomic: no .tmp file survives and the final marker is well-formed JSON (patch 2 regression)
Re-stall rewrites the marker with the new reason, never appended
LoadPending: missing -> (nil,nil); corrupt JSON -> typed error; path-is-directory -> read error
ClearPending idempotent on absence; surfaces non-absence removal errors
ResolveMerge gating matrix: APPLY+clean finalizes; ESCALATE keeps worktree+marker; invalid/missing evidence refuses; dirty-main blocks even on APPLY; corrupt marker errors
ResolveMerge finalizes even when the worktree was removed out-of-band (Remove idempotent)
Hook re-emits only while a marker exists AND no valid steward evidence; silent on valid evidence and when no marker; handles multiple markers; skips corrupt markers without panic
--continue with schema-invalid steward evidence is refused via the orchestration validator
Steward directive names the merge-steward prompt, feature, and the centinela merge --continue resume command
